queries.feature_definition: Credit history: critical account or other existing credits.
queries.question: • Empirical analysis of the risk-mitigating impact of critical accounts or other existing credits on the probability of consumer loan default.
• Determinants of default: empirical analysis of how extended loan duration in months reduces the likelihood of credit default in consumer lending.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: • Credit risk drivers: empirical analysis of the risk-amplifying effect of negative checking account balances on the determinants of consumer credit default.
